settings.caption: Our Team
settings.heading: Meet the Divine Ingredients Team
settings.text: Passionate experts curating the finest organic teas, matcha, superfood powders, and artisan spices — sourced with care and delivered with purpose.

settings.title: Sourcing & Quality
settings.text:
Our sourcing team travels the world to build direct partnerships with certified organic farms across Japan, India, Sri Lanka, and beyond. Every grower relationship is founded on trust, fair trade, and an unwavering commitment to purity.

Email: sourcing@divineingredients.com

settings.title: Product Development
settings.text:
From ceremonial matcha to custom superfood blends, our product team works closely with creators, chefs, and wellness brands to develop ingredients that meet the highest standards of quality and taste.

Email: products@divineingredients.com

settings.title: Customer Success
settings.text:
Whether you're a home cook or a wholesale partner, our customer team is dedicated to ensuring your experience is seamless — from your first order to your hundredth. We're here to help you find exactly what you need.

Email: hello@divineingredients.com

settings.caption: Sourcing
settings.heading: Global Farm Partnerships
settings.subheading: We travel the world to build direct partnerships with organic farmers. From matcha fields in Uji, Japan to spice growers in Kerala, India — every relationship is built on trust and shared values.

settings.caption: Quality
settings.heading: Lab-Tested Purity
settings.subheading: Every batch we offer is independently lab-tested for purity, potency, heavy metals, and allergen safety. We never compromise on the standards that matter.

settings.caption: Community
settings.heading: Creators & Partners
settings.subheading: We work alongside café owners, wellness brands, recipe creators, and home chefs who share our commitment to quality ingredients that make a real difference.

settings.caption: Wholesale
settings.heading: The Divine Family
settings.subheading: From small kitchens to large-scale operations, we're honored to be the ingredient partner for businesses who demand the very best.

settings.text: From a passion for pure, authentic ingredients to a trusted source for creators worldwide — discover how Divine Ingredients has grown while staying true to our founding values of quality, transparency, and care.

settings.heading: Origins
settings.row_content:
A Passion for Purity

Divine Ingredients was born from a simple belief: that the best creations deserve the best ingredients. Frustrated by the lack of transparency in ingredient sourcing, we set out to build a brand that connects conscious creators directly with certified organic farms around the world.

settings.heading: Growth
settings.row_content:
Building Trust, One Ingredient at a Time

Word spread quickly. Chefs, café owners, and wellness brands discovered that our matcha, spices, and superfood powders were different — purer, more vibrant, and completely free from synthetic additives. We expanded our collection while deepening our farm partnerships across Japan, India, Sri Lanka, and beyond.

settings.heading: Quality
settings.row_content:
Raising the Standard

We invested in rigorous lab testing for every batch — verifying purity, potency, heavy metals, and allergen safety. Our USDA organic certification and zero-additive promise became the foundation that earned the trust of both individual creators and wholesale partners.

settings.heading: Today
settings.row_content:
A Community of Creators

Today, Divine Ingredients is trusted by home cooks, professional chefs, wellness brands, and private label partners across North America and beyond. Our collection spans premium matcha, loose leaf teas, superfood powders, and artisan spices — all sourced with the same care and integrity we started with.
